languages.text: "Фиксирую аугментику неизвестной конструкции, вероятно, ручного производства. Вероятность техноереси: 54.89355%. Рекомендую освобождения от страдания духа машины сей оскверненной обители".
"Registering an augmetic of unknown construction, probably handmade. Probability of tech-heresy: 54.89355%. Recommending the release of the machine spirit from the torment of this corrupted abode."
languages.original_text: "Фиксирую аугментику неизвестной конструкции, вероятно, ручного производства. Вероятность техноереси: 54.89355%. Рекомендую освобождения от страдания духа машины сей оскверненной обители".

"Registering an augmetic of unknown construction, probably handmade. Probability of tech-heresy: 54.89355%. Recommending the release of the machine spirit from the torment of this corrupted abode."

languages.text: 「未知の構造の増幅器を登録した。おそらく手作りのもの。技術的異端の確率は54.89355%。この腐敗した住処から機械霊を解放することを推奨する」
languages.original_text: "Registering an augmetic of unknown construction, probably handmade. Probability of tech-heresy: 54.89355%. Recommending the release of the machine spirit from the torment of this corrupted abode."

traits.locale_text: 「未知の構造の増幅器を登録しました。おそらく手作りのもの。技術的異端の確率は54.89355%。この腐敗した住処から機械霊を解放することを推奨します。」

languages.text: "Yapısı bilinmeyen, muhtemelen el yapımı bir ogmetik kaydediliyor. Tekno kâfirlik olasılığı: %54,89355. Makine ruhunun bu yozlaşmış meskenin işkencesinden kurtarılması öneriliyor."
languages.original_text: "Registering an augmetic of unknown construction, probably handmade. Probability of tech-heresy: 54.89355%. Recommending the release of the machine spirit from the torment of this corrupted abode."

traits.locale_text: "Yapısı bilinmeyen, muhtemelen el yapımı bir ogmetik kaydediliyor. Tekno kâfirlik olasılığı: %54,89355. Makine ruhunun bu yozlaşmış meskenin işkencesinden kurtarılması öneriliyor."

languages.text: «Registrando un aumético de fabricación desconocida, potencialmente manufacturado. Probabilidad de tecnoherejía: 54,89355 %. Recomiendo la liberación del espíritu máquina del tormento de esta morada corrupta».
languages.original_text: "Registering an augmetic of unknown construction, probably handmade. Probability of tech-heresy: 54.89355%. Recommending the release of the machine spirit from the torment of this corrupted abode."

traits.locale_text: «Registrando un aumético de fabricación desconocida, potencialmente manufacturado. Probabilidad de tecnoherejía: 54,89355 %. Recomiendo la liberación del espíritu máquina del tormento de esta morada corrupta».

languages.text: “正在登记构造未知的植入物，疑为手工制造。技术异端概率：54.89355%。建议释放机魂，使其脱离此腐化居所的折磨。”
languages.original_text: "Registering an augmetic of unknown construction, probably handmade. Probability of tech-heresy: 54.89355%. Recommending the release of the machine spirit from the torment of this corrupted abode."

traits.locale_text: “正在登记构造未知的植入物，疑为手工制造。技术异端概率：54.89355%。建议释放机魂，使其脱离此腐化居所的折磨。”

languages.text: « Il s'agit d'un augmétique d'origine inconnue, de facture probablement artisanale. Probabilité de technohérésie : 54,89355 %. Il est recommandé de libérer l'esprit de la machine du tourment de cette demeure corrompue. »
languages.original_text: "Registering an augmetic of unknown construction, probably handmade. Probability of tech-heresy: 54.89355%. Recommending the release of the machine spirit from the torment of this corrupted abode."

traits.locale_text: « Il s'agit d'un augmétique d'origine inconnue, de facture probablement artisanale. Probabilité de technohérésie : 54,89355 %. Il est recommandé de libérer l'esprit de la machine du tourment de cette demeure corrompue. »

languages.text: "Registriere eine Augmentation unbekannter Herkunft, vermutlich handgefertigt. Wahrscheinlichkeit von Tech-Ketzerei: 54,89355 %. Empfehle die Freilassung des Maschinengeistes aus der Folter dieser korrumpierten Wohnstatt."
